name: chr1_1q23_olfactory_receptor_cluster
description: 1q23-q24 olfactory-receptor (OR) gene cluster, one of the larger autosomal OR clusters. ORs are short single-exon 7TM GPCR genes that arose by tandem and segmental duplication; this cluster contains OR6F1, OR6K2/3/6, OR10K1/2, OR10R2, OR10J1/3/4/5 paralogs.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of intronless 7TM-receptor genes at 70-95% identity, interspersed with OR pseudogenes; flanking SDs <50 kb.
